Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hvac contractor services.

How quickly can you repair my furnace?

We offer same-day service for many furnace repairs. Our technicians arrive prepared with the tools and parts needed to diagnose and fix most common issues on the spot.

What are the signs that my furnace needs repair?

Common signs include unusual noises, inconsistent heating, a yellow pilot light, and a sudden increase in your energy bills. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to call for a professional inspection.

Do you offer furnace maintenance services?

Yes, we offer comprehensive furnace maintenance services to keep your system running efficiently and prevent costly repairs. Regular maintenance can extend the life of your furnace and improve its performance.

Reviews From Our HVAC Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Our AC broke down during a heatwave, and BI-TI Heating & Cooling came to the rescue! They were fast, professional, and fixed the problem quickly. I highly recommend them!"

Maria S. AC Repair

"BI-TI Heating & Cooling installed a new furnace for us, and the process was smooth from start to finish. The team was knowledgeable and answered all our questions. We're very happy with the new furnace and the service we received."

David K. Furnace Installation

"I noticed a musty smell in my house, and BI-TI Heating & Cooling recommended duct cleaning. The difference is amazing! The air feels cleaner, and the smell is gone. Great service!"

Jessica L. Duct Cleaning
